calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Sau Wa Joee Wong, present in pro per and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Haylie Tse Yan Wong Wampler.
The Minor's father/Co-Petitioner: Michael Wampler is also present in court.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Joee Wong Sau Wa Wampler, and
grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Haylie Wong Tse Yan Wampler.
Decree signed in open court.
